title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Basil Hawkins, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: These straw men represent my subordinates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My straw- straw fruit* lets me hold these clones inside of me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Which means that... I remain undam- aged!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If there are 10 of these, I can die 10 times.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now... let's start our little game, shall we...!?

dialogue.speaker: Basil Hawkins
dialogue.text: We'll start with my straw man's card.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not honourable enough to simply fight two of the worst generation head-on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Woah!! something came out of him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's tougher than I thought... but that's to be expected....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry... I'll draw a good card next time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These cards can be a little risky, but... I have some...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that give an individual the ability to to to to to to to surpass their limits....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the hell are they doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Heeeeey!! What are you doing, dog!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's why this dog was in a rush.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is the card of pursuit!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Protect the kid!! I'll take care of this guy!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 51 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
